query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750013, 'What is the interpretive journey from text to application?', 'multiple_choice', '["Skip interpretation and apply directly","Determine original meaning, cross the bridge, apply to contemporary context","Ignore original meaning","Apply only to ancient context"]', 'Determine original meaning, cross the bridge, apply to contemporary context', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'What is the "principlizing bridge"?', 'multiple_choice', '["A literal bridge","The theological principle that connects ancient and modern contexts","A translation method","A reading technique"]', 'The theological principle that connects ancient and modern contexts', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'What must we distinguish in application?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","Cultural expressions from transcultural principles","Old from New Testament","Hebrew from Greek"]', 'Cultural expressions from transcultural principles', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'What role does the Holy Spirit play in application?', 'multiple_choice', '["None","Illumination and conviction","Dictation","Replacement of study"]', 'Illumination and conviction', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'According to James 1:22, what should we be?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hearers only","Doers of the word","Debaters","Critics"]', 'Doers of the word', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'What is contextualization?', 'multiple_choice', '["Changing the message","Expressing the unchanging message in culturally appropriate forms","Ignoring culture","Rejecting tradition"]', 'Expressing the unchanging message in culturally appropriate forms', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'What is the danger of under-contextualization?', 'multiple_choice', '["Too relevant","Message seems foreign and irrelevant","Too simple","Too complex"]', 'Message seems foreign and irrelevant', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'What is the danger of over-contextualization?', 'multiple_choice', '["Too foreign","Message is compromised by cultural accommodation","Too simple","Too complex"]', 'Message is compromised by cultural accommodation', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'According to 2 Timothy 3:16-17, what is Scripture profitable for?', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment","Teaching, reproof, correction, training in righteousness","Historical record","Debate"]', 'Teaching, reproof, correction, training in righteousness', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'What is the goal of biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Academic knowledge only","Transformed lives that glorify God","Winning arguments","Personal satisfaction"]', 'Transformed lives that glorify God', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750013, 'Describe the process of moving from biblical interpretation to contemporary application using a specific passage as an example.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());

(750013, 'What is the goal of biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Academic knowledge only","Transformed lives that glorify God","Winning arguments","Personal satisfaction"]', 'Transformed lives that glorify God', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
